papers.title: Activating p53<sup>Y220C</sup> with a mutant-specific small molecule
papers.headline: Scientists created a drug that reawakens a broken tumor-fighting protein in certain cancers.
cancer_types: Cancers with p53 Y220C mutations (specific subset of solid tumors)

papers.title: Blood test hints at breast-tumour response to treatment
papers.headline: A blood test can predict which breast cancer patients will benefit from immune therapy.

papers.title: The SnRK1–RAP2.4h–PIP2 module contributes to the trade-off between growth and hypoxia tolerance in plants
papers.headline: Plants use a molecular switch to decide between growing fast or surviving floods.

papers.title: An agentic framework for autonomous scientific discovery in cancer pathology
papers.headline: AI system autonomously discovers cancer biology insights by thinking like a scientist.
cancer_types: Multiple cancer types across 18 cohorts (specific types not detailed in abstract)
papers.ml_angle: SPARK uses machine learning and natural language processing to act as an autonomous research agent that can read cancer data, generate biological theories, and test them without human intervention at each step.

papers.title: Predicting referral need for febrile children in low-resource community settings in South and Southeast Asia
papers.headline: Simple tests help doctors quickly spot which sick children need urgent hospital care in poor regions.
papers.ml_angle: The study used prediction models (likely machine learning algorithms) to combine multiple clinical inputs and test results to more accurately predict which children needed referral than doctors using standard guidelines alone.

papers.title: Evolutionary characterization of lung cancer metastasis
papers.headline: Scientists map how lung cancer spreads by sequencing tumors and their distant colonies.

papers.title: Spatial atlas of diabetic kidney disease reveals a B cell-rich subgroup
papers.headline: Scientists find immune cells that mark patients whose diabetic kidney damage worsens quickly.

papers.title: Improving access to essential medicines via decision-aware machine learning
papers.headline: Decision-aware machine learning improves essential medicine allocation in resource-limited settings.
papers.ml_angle: Decision-aware machine learning framework integrating practical constraints and allocation decisions to optimize essential medicine distribution in healthcare systems.

papers.title: Safety and efficacy of intratumoural anti-CTLA4 with intravenous anti-PD1
papers.headline: Intratumoural ipilimumab with IV nivolumab improves safety and efficacy in combined immunotherapy.

papers.title: Multimodal AI integrating pathology, genomics, and clinical data predicts immunotherapy response in non-small cell lung cancer
papers.headline: A multimodal AI model predicts immunotherapy response in lung cancer with 82% accuracy, outperforming PD-L1 expression alone.
papers.ml_angle: Transformer-based multimodal fusion model integrating digital pathology (ViT encoder), transcriptomics, and clinical tabular data via cross-attention.
